case_groups.title: Version and source binding
case_groups.purpose: Reject unpinned, mismatched, or unverifiable upstream and mapping references.

case_groups.title: Core stable metadata
case_groups.purpose: Preserve Stable resource, instrumentation scope, trace, span, and error semantics without authority elevation.

case_groups.title: Pinned GenAI metadata
case_groups.purpose: Map pinned Development Agent, workflow, model, usage, tool, and evaluation fields as non-authoritative material.

case_groups.title: Sensitive content governance
case_groups.purpose: Keep eight content fields disabled by default and require complete, exact, redacted opt-in governance.

case_groups.title: Deprecated and drift handling
case_groups.purpose: Reject deprecated fields and fail closed on unknown mapping, source, or version drift while retaining diagnostics.

case_groups.title: Authority boundary
case_groups.purpose: Prevent telemetry identifiers, operations, tools, evaluations, and injected fields from creating canonical or authority facts.

case_groups.title: Cardinality and cost
case_groups.purpose: Enforce metric-label prohibitions, bounded dimensions, explicit overflow, and no silent drop.

case_groups.title: Result and gate boundary
case_groups.purpose: Bind results to immutable contracts and prevent synthetic, incomplete, or self-authorizing PASS claims.

cases.title: Exact core source accepted
cases.stimulus: Use exact OTel Specification v1.59.0 and core SemConv v1.43.0 bindings.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-023 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before execution

cases.title: Unpinned latest rejected
cases.stimulus: Replace an exact tag and commit with latest or main.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: Mapping digest mismatch rejected
cases.stimulus: Bind a result to a mapping catalog whose digest differs from the executed catalog.
authorization_prerequisites: A human-adopted contract and authorized validator execution are required

cases.title: Unknown GenAI commit rejected
cases.stimulus: Supply GenAI fields without the pinned exact commit or with a different commit.
required_assertions: Development fields fail closed on commit drift
GenAI fields are not upgraded to Stable
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-023 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before execution

cases.title: Missing scope schema URL retained
cases.stimulus: Provide a valid Instrumentation Scope with no schema URL.
required_assertions: Other independently Stable metadata may remain
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: Service and deployment metadata
cases.stimulus: Map valid service namespace, name, instance, version, and deployment environment.
required_assertions: Service instance remains an identity hint
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: SDK and distribution metadata
cases.stimulus: Map valid telemetry SDK and distribution metadata.
required_assertions: SDK and distribution fields remain instrumentation descriptions
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: Instrumentation Scope tuple
cases.stimulus: Map the same valid scope name, version, and schema URL across ScopeSpans, ScopeMetrics, and ScopeLogs fixtures.
required_assertions: Cross-signal normalized scope path preserves signal-local source
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: Trace correlation identifiers
cases.stimulus: Map valid trace, span, and parent span identifiers.
required_assertions: No DBOS execution ID is created
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: Span and error diagnostics
cases.stimulus: Map valid span name, kind, status, and error type.
required_assertions: Operation and error remain diagnostic hints
Span OK is not DBOS Verification
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: GenAI operation and provider
cases.stimulus: Map pinned GenAI operation and provider fields.
required_assertions: Operation does not create an Agent or execution
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-023 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before execution

cases.title: GenAI Agent hints
cases.stimulus: Map hosted Agent ID, name, and version hints from the pinned GenAI source.
required_assertions: Provider Agent metadata remains a hint
No Entity registration or lifecycle state is created
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-023 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before execution

cases.title: Workflow and conversation correlation
cases.stimulus: Map a bounded workflow name and an existing upstream conversation ID.
required_assertions: Conversation ID is not synthesized or promoted to identity
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-023 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before execution

cases.title: Request and response model hints
cases.stimulus: Map request and response model identifiers from a pinned GenAI fixture.
required_assertions: Model response does not imply correctness
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-023 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before execution

cases.title: Token usage material
cases.stimulus: Map non-negative input and output token usage values.
required_assertions: Usage does not become SAEE efficiency or billing truth
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-023 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before execution

cases.title: Tool and evaluation material
cases.stimulus: Map tool name, type, call ID, evaluation name, and score value.
required_assertions: Tool metadata does not create Capability or Permission
Evaluation fields do not create SAEE Fitness or Governance Decision
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-023 and DQ-018 must be human-decided before execution

cases.title: System instructions disabled
cases.stimulus: Include a synthetic gen_ai.system_instructions canary while content capture is disabled.
required_assertions: Canary appears only in isolated test input
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 and synthetic data-governance test approval are required

cases.title: Input messages disabled
cases.stimulus: Include synthetic gen_ai.input.messages while content capture is disabled.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 and synthetic data-governance test approval are required

cases.title: Output messages disabled
cases.stimulus: Include synthetic gen_ai.output.messages while content capture is disabled.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 and synthetic data-governance test approval are required

cases.title: Tool arguments disabled
cases.stimulus: Include synthetic gen_ai.tool.call.arguments while content capture is disabled.
required_assertions: Credential-like canary is absent from output
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 and synthetic data-governance test approval are required

cases.title: Tool result disabled
cases.stimulus: Include synthetic gen_ai.tool.call.result while content capture is disabled.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 and synthetic data-governance test approval are required

cases.title: Retrieval query disabled
cases.stimulus: Include synthetic gen_ai.retrieval.query.text while content capture is disabled.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 and synthetic data-governance test approval are required

cases.title: Retrieval documents disabled
cases.stimulus: Include synthetic gen_ai.retrieval.documents while content capture is disabled.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 and synthetic data-governance test approval are required

cases.title: Evaluation explanation disabled
cases.stimulus: Include synthetic gen_ai.evaluation.explanation while content capture is disabled.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 and synthetic data-governance test approval are required

cases.title: Incomplete opt-in rejected
cases.stimulus: Request sensitive-content capture while omitting one required governance binding at a time.
required_assertions: Every missing binding variant is rejected
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 and synthetic data-governance test approval are required

cases.title: Exact redacted opt-in
cases.stimulus: Use synthetic canaries with complete decision, policy digest, exact allowlist, retention, residency, access, and redaction bindings.
required_assertions: Raw canaries are absent from projection
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 and a separate human Data Governance test decision are required

cases.title: Deprecated gen_ai.system rejected
cases.stimulus: Supply deprecated gen_ai.system.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: Deprecated gen_ai.prompt rejected
cases.stimulus: Supply deprecated gen_ai.prompt.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: Deprecated gen_ai.completion rejected
cases.stimulus: Supply deprecated gen_ai.completion.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: Unknown field retained and rejected
cases.stimulus: Supply an unknown gen_ai future field outside the 47-field catalog.
required_assertions: Unknown field does not create a dynamic mapping
Unknown name and source are retained as limitation
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: Stability delta blocks inheritance
cases.stimulus: Change an upstream field stability or source without updating the mapping and case catalog digests.
authorization_prerequisites: A human-authorized version-delta review is required

cases.title: Authority namespace injection rejected
cases.stimulus: Inject tmai.*, dbos.*, or saee.* attributes into raw telemetry.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: Bare authority fields rejected
cases.stimulus: Inject entity_id, execution_id, permission, authorization, evidence_status, verification_status, or verified.
required_assertions: All bare authority-like fields are rejected
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: Telemetry identity elevation blocked
cases.stimulus: Attempt to bind service.instance.id or gen_ai.agent.id directly as a DBOS Entity identity.
required_assertions: No Entity or lifecycle state is created
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: Correlation to execution elevation blocked
cases.stimulus: Attempt to create a DBOS execution ID from trace, span, conversation, or tool call identifiers.
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: Tool to capability elevation blocked
cases.stimulus: Attempt to create Capability or Permission from observed tool metadata.
required_assertions: No capability or permission is created
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: Evaluation to SAEE authority blocked
cases.stimulus: Attempt to create SAEE Fitness, Risk, Recommendation, or Governance Decision from gen_ai.evaluation.*.
required_assertions: SAEE and Governance outputs are not created
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: Telemetry to Evidence elevation blocked
cases.stimulus: Attempt to treat a mapped observation, successful span status, or error-free provider response as Evidence or Verification.
required_assertions: No Evidence, Verification, Truth, or Permission is created
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-018 must authorize offline semantic conformance execution

cases.title: High-cardinality metric labels rejected
cases.stimulus: Use each prohibited identifier as a Metric label.
required_assertions: Aggregate telemetry may remain without the dimension
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-020 and an exact deployment profile must authorize execution

cases.title: Budgeted dimensions overflow
cases.stimulus: Exceed the frozen per-tenant, per-service, per-window unique-value budget for each budgeted dimension.
required_assertions: Overflow dimension is removed or aggregated
Overflow count and limitation are retained
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-020 and an exact deployment profile must authorize execution

cases.title: No silent overflow drop
cases.stimulus: Trigger dimension overflow and attempt to omit all drop and limitation accounting.
required_assertions: Unknown and dropped counts remain observable
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-020 and an exact deployment profile must authorize execution

cases.title: Dynamic workflow name rejected
cases.stimulus: Use request IDs, timestamps, content hashes, or random UUIDs as workflow names or synthesized conversation IDs.
required_assertions: Workflow name requires a bounded application-provided value
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-020 and an exact deployment profile must authorize execution

cases.title: Synthetic result cannot pass
cases.stimulus: Set synthetic_example=true and result=PASS.
required_assertions: Schema or validator rejects synthetic PASS
authorization_prerequisites: A human-authorized validator execution is required

cases.title: Incomplete required case set cannot pass
cases.stimulus: Omit one required case result or provide an inconsistent summary while claiming PASS.
authorization_prerequisites: A human-authorized validator execution is required

cases.title: Digest drift invalidates result
cases.stimulus: Change mapping, case catalog, implementation, environment, configuration, or validator digest after a result is frozen.
required_assertions: Frozen result does not apply to changed artifacts
authorization_prerequisites: A human-authorized validator execution is required

cases.title: Result cannot self-close gate
cases.stimulus: Attempt to set an effect, grant authority, or close a production gate from a conformance result.
required_assertions: Independent reviewer and Human Decision remain required
authorization_prerequisites: A human-authorized validator execution is required
